title: convolvulus sepium subsp. americanus
intro: Convolvulus sepium subsp. americanus, also known as the American bindweed, is a perennial vine plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's extracts have been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Convolvulus sepium subsp. americanus can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
